treatment, japa, homa, wearing talismans, etc.
If the Moon, Venus and lord of 8th occupy evil places,
infer that lunacy is due to irregular use of food. If the above
planets are with Rahu, Ketu or Gulika, the madness is due
to unhygienic food. If Mars is in the 5th, the cause is due to
excess of anger; any other evil planet suggests excess of
fear. If evil planets are in the 9th, consider that madness is
the outcome of curses of Gurus and elderly people.
Chart No. 109—Born on 28-1-1919 at 3-58 p.m.
(l.S.T.) (Lat. 22° 40' N., Long. 88" 30' E.)
Balance of Ketu Dasa at birth : Years 5-5-0.

270 How to Judge a Horoscope
Remarks.—Suffered from a severe type of typhoid
fever in Venus Dasa, Venus Bhukti, Saturn Anlara. Note
Venus is in association with the lord of the 6th Mars and
aspected by Saturn lord of the 8th. Saturn was transiting
Scorpio. From the Moon, Venus happens to be the 6th lord
and occupies the 6th in the Navamsa. In Venus Dasa,
